definition: ability to be retained in, or restored to a state to perform as required, under given conditions of use and maintenance

definition_ml.en: ability to be retained in, or restored to a state to perform as required, under given conditions of use and maintenance

note:
Note 1 Given conditions would include aspects that affect maintainability, such as: location for maintenance, accessibility, maintenance procedures and maintenance resources.

Note 2 Maintainability may be quantified using measures defined in Section IEV 192-07, Maintainability and maintenance support: measures.

note_ml.en:
Note 1 Given conditions would include aspects that affect maintainability, such as: location for maintenance, accessibility, maintenance procedures and maintenance resources.

Note 2 Maintainability may be quantified using measures defined in Section IEV 192-07, Maintainability and maintenance support: measures.
